title: pelargonium × enigmaticum
intro: Pelargonium × enigmaticum, also known as the enigmatic geranium, is a hybrid plant species within the pelargonium genus, characterized by its unique and variable appearance. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to the presence of compounds like rosmarinic acid and ursolic acid. The medicinal properties of Pelargonium × enigmaticum have been found to provide various health benefits, including relief from digestive issues, sore throats, and respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas and tinctures, can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water or extracting the active compounds with a solvent like ethanol or glycerin.
